description: Create the ltx_pro/ package foundation modules: __init__.py, config.py, vram.py, utils.py. These are the leaf-level modules with no internal dependencies that everything else builds on.
steps: Create ltx_pro/__init__.py with package version ('2.0.0'), __all__ exports listing all public module names, and lazy imports from submodules.

Create ltx_pro/config.py: Extract ALL configuration constants, preset definitions, resolution definitions, feature toggle defaults (ENABLE_* flags), _PRESET_DEFINITIONS, _RESOLUTION_DEFINITIONS, model filename defaults (UNET_MODEL, CLIP_NAME1, etc.), sampling defaults (PASS1_SIGMAS, etc.), quality keywords (STORY_QUALITY_KEYWORDS), and helper functions (apply_preset, print_current_config, validate_config, disable_all_extras, enable_recommended, show_help, estimate_generation_time, estimate_vram_usage, suggest_settings). Source: Lines 4141-4617 (Cells 3.5 and 3.6) plus the config constants from Cell 6 (lines 5522-5699). Include __all__ export list.

Create ltx_pro/vram.py: Extract VRAMManager class (lines 288-451), vram_guard decorator (lines 454-465), cleanup_memory() (line 2177), aggressive_cleanup() (line 2194), _deep_unload_model() (line 2217), force_unload_all_models() (line 2275), _print_vram() (line 2319), purge_vram() (line 2609), _verify_vram_clear() (line 5709). Create module-level _VRAM_MGR singleton. Include __all__ export list.

Create ltx_pro/utils.py: Extract utility functions: get_value_at_index() (line 2331), pil_to_tensor() (line 2338), tensor_to_pil() (line 2343), load_image_tensor() (line 2349), get_last_frame_tensor() (line 2355), display_video() (line 2505), save_video_from_components() (line 2516), save_metadata_sidecar() (line 2529), validate_model_files() (line 2541), upload_image() (line 2631), import_custom_nodes() (line 2160), install_apt_packages() (line 119), model_download() (line 160). Include __all__ export list.

Ensure all modules pass python3 -m py_compile. Heavy imports (torch, numpy, cv2, comfy, etc.) must be inside functions or guarded with try/except at module level so the files are at least syntax-valid even without those packages installed.
Run: find ltx_pro -name '*.py' -exec python3 -m py_compile {} \; to verify all files compile cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: ltx_pro/__init__.py exists with version string and __all__
ltx_pro/config.py contains all preset definitions, feature toggle defaults, and helper functions with __all__
ltx_pro/vram.py contains VRAMManager class, cleanup functions, and decorator with __all__
ltx_pro/utils.py contains all utility functions with __all__
All four files pass python3 -m py_compile without errors
Each module has docstrings on all public classes and functions
findings: All four modules compile and import cleanly. VRAMManager detects CPU mode (no GPU in sandbox) which is expected. Heavy imports (torch, numpy, cv2, PIL, comfy, google.colab, IPython) are all guarded inside function bodies. The config module uses deferred imports from ltx_pro.vram in functions that need _VRAM_MGR (validate_config, enable_recommended, estimate_generation_time, estimate_vram_usage).
